title: Quick Chicken and Rice Skillet
directions: Dice the chicken into bite-size pieces.
Saute onion in olive oil over medium heat.
Stir in cooked rice and season.

title: Cheesy Baked Pasta
directions: Make a cheese sauce with butter, flour, milk, and cheddar.

title: Spinach and Egg Breakfast Bowl
directions: Scramble the eggs on medium heat.

title: Vegan Chickpea Curry
directions: Simmer 15 minutes and serve over rice.

title: Chicken Caesar Salad
directions: Grill the chicken 5 minutes per side.
Top with sliced chicken, parmesan, and croutons.

title: Salmon with Roasted Vegetables
directions: Add salmon fillet for the last 12 minutes.

title: Egg Fried Rice
directions: Fry cold rice on high heat.
Add peas, soy sauce, and eggs.

title: Greek Yogurt Parfait
directions: Layer yogurt, honey, granola, and berries in a glass.
